mapper.update: UPDATE user_follow SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT up.id, up.nickname, up.avatar_url, up.bio, up.follower_count, up.following_count, up.article_count, up.status, up.version, up.created_at, up.updated_at FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = uf.followee_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = 1 AND up.status = 1 ORDER BY uf.updated_at DESC, uf.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = uf.followee_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = 1 AND up.status = 1

SELECT up.id, up.nickname, up.avatar_url, up.bio, up.follower_count, up.following_count, up.article_count, up.status, up.version, up.created_at, up.updated_at FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = uf.follower_id WHERE uf.followee_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = 1 AND up.status = 1 ORDER BY uf.updated_at DESC, uf.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN user_profile up ON up.id = uf.follower_id WHERE uf.followee_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = 1 AND up.status = 1
